assertions.description: The midboard is a 93x93mm mechanical inter-board connector plate containing only 6 THT connectors (J1-J6) with no copper traces, no vias, and no copper zones. The analyzer correctly reports copper_layers_used=0, track_segments=0, via_count=0. Net count of 6 with routing_complete=True is consistent with the footprint pad assignments carrying through even though there are no routed tracks.
